name: play_mode
description: Control Unity's Play mode: enter, exit, pause, or check status. Entering Play mode may trigger a domain reload — the MCP session will automatically reconnect afterward. Use 'stop' to return to Edit mode before making scene changes.

action.description: The action to perform. 'play' enters Play mode, 'stop' exits to Edit mode, 'pause' toggles pause while playing, 'status' reports current mode. Default: 'status'.
